raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-K-001] header.h:2 typedef resolved: lapack_int = int (4 bytes).
  Fortran INTEGER(c_int64_t) = 8 bytes.
  Mismatch on: n, nrhs, lda, ldb, info (all 5 integer parameters).

NOTE: Rebuild C header with -DLAPACK_ILP64 to match Fortran ILP64 interface,
      or change Fortran to INTEGER(c_int).
